SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

Class StarterFront

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Face
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.StarterFront
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class StarterFront extends Face
The StarterFront class represents the front face of a StarterCard This class is a subclass of Face and it adds the central Content list.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • StarterFront

      public StarterFront(int id, Content[] corners, ArrayList<Content> center, String imagePath)
      Constructs a new StarterFront with the specified values.
      Parameters:
      id - the card's id it belongs to
      corners - the array that contains the Content of each corner. The contents' order must be:
      • corners[0] for the top left Content
      • corners[1] for the top right Content
      • corners[2] for the bottom left Content
      • corners[3] for the bottom right Content
      center - the central Content list
      imagePath - the path of the image that represents this StarterFront. This image will be used in GUI.

  • Method Details

    • getCenter

      public ArrayList<Content> getCenter()
      Returns an ArrayList with the central Content list.
      Returns:
      an ArrayList with the central Content list
